entities.name: HELICOVERPA ARMIGERA
entities.description: An important global pest that causes significant loss to vegetative and reproductive plant parts of various crops.

entities.name: TROPICAL AND SUBTROPICAL CROPS
entities.description: A range of crops in tropical and subtropical regions affected by Helicoverpa armigera.

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: A geographical region where the damage caused by Helicoverpa armigera is particularly enormous.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A country where Helicoverpa armigera has been recorded from over 20 crops and 180 wild hosts.

entities.name: COTTON
entities.description: A crop that experiences cyclic appearance of Helicoverpa armigera.

entities.name: PULSES
entities.description: Crops that experience cyclic appearance of Helicoverpa armigera.

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand or defend against attack by Helicoverpa armigera.

entities.name: BREEDING
entities.description: The process of developing plant varieties with resistance to Helicoverpa armigera.

relationships.description: Breeding is used to develop resistance
Resistance is developed to combat the pest
Causes loss to vegetative and reproductive parts
Causes enormous damage in this region
Recorded from numerous crops and wild hosts in this country
